mapper.select: SELECT t.ID AS id, t.YEAR AS year, t.COST_TYPE AS costType, d.DICT_LABEL AS costTypeName, t.AMOUNT AS amount, t.CREATE_BY AS createBy, t.CREATE_TIME AS createTime, t.UPDATE_BY AS updateBy, t.UPDATE_TIME AS updateTime FROM E_COST_BUDGET_MANAGEMENT t LEFT JOIN M_DICT_DATA d ON d.DICT_TYPE = '' AND d.DICT_VALUE = t.COST_TYPE AND d.STATUS = '1' WHERE t.ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO E_COST_BUDGET_MANAGEMENT ( ID, YEAR, COST_TYPE, AMOUNT, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{year}, #{costType}, #{amount}, #{loginUserId}, #{now}, #{loginUserId}, #{now} )
mapper.update: UPDATE E_COST_BUDGET_MANAGEMENT SET YEAR = #{year}, COST_TYPE = #{costType}, AMOUNT = #{amount}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now} WHERE ID = #{id}
